description: Desktop notifications when Claude needs input or completes tasks

hooks.command: jq -r '.type + ": " + .message' | { read msg; if command -v notify-send &>/dev/null; then notify-send 'Claude Code' "$msg"; elif command -v osascript &>/dev/null; then osascript -e "display notification \"$msg\" with title \"Claude Code\""; fi; }

if command -v notify-send &>/dev/null; then notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Task completed'; elif command -v osascript &>/dev/null; then osascript -e 'display notification "Task completed" with title "Claude Code"'; fi
